legacy_address: 20 Fenchurch Street, City of London, London EC3M 3BY
download_notes: Portal navigation to retrieve keyVal and documents not yet attempted; reference and details established via GLA strategic planning report and City Corporation committee records, but documents retrieval remains pending.
notes: Identified main full planning application reference for redevelopment of 20 Fenchurch Street as 08/01061/FULMAJ, granted October 2009 under City of London jurisdiction ([democracy.cityoflondon.gov.uk](https://democracy.cityoflondon.gov.uk/CeConvert2PDF.aspx?A=1&F=17b+-+Redevelopment+of+20+Fenchurch+Street+%E2%80%93+Potential+Acquisition+of+Land+for+Planning+Purposes.doc&MID=6425&R=0&utm_source=openai)). Applicant was The City of London Real Property Company Ltd with Rafael Viñoly Architects as architect; building completed 2014 ([london.gov.uk](https://www.london.gov.uk/sites/default/files/public%3A/public%3A/PAWS/media_id_1236/20_fenchurch_street_report.pdf?utm_source=openai)). A subsequent full application 14/00110/FULL for brise soleil on south elevation was granted April 2014 ([democracy.cityoflondon.gov.uk](https://democracy.cityoflondon.gov.uk/mgAi.aspx?ID=25642&utm_source=openai)). Retrieval of planning documents from City of London online portal in progress.
